name: Careys Credit Repair LLC
description_short: Careys Credit Repair disputes inaccurate items on credit reports and provides personalized credit restoration strategies. Services include judgment removal, collection disputes, and late payment challenges with results typically seen within 30-90 days.
description_long:
Careys Credit Repair is a credit restoration company based in the Dallas area (469 phone number) that specializes in disputing negative and inaccurate information on consumer credit reports. The company positions itself as a guide through the complex credit repair process, emphasizing expertise in navigating laws that regulate credit bureaus, creditors, and debt collectors. Founded on the principle that education is key to credit restoration, they combine dispute services with ongoing consumer education throughout the credit repair journey.

The company offers a three-step process: free initial consultation, personalized credit strategy development, and ongoing dispute work. Their primary service is disputing inaccurate information across major negative categories including judgments (90% success rate claimed), collections (80%), late payments (95%), and hard inquiries (88%). Clients pay a $149 upfront credit analysis fee for a detailed diagnostic report, then $99/month for ongoing dispute services. The company claims most customers see results within 30-90 days and allows month-to-month cancellation without long-term contracts.

Careys distinguishes itself through claimed high success rates in specific dispute categories, transparent monthly-only pricing without prepayment requirements, and a commitment to customer education beyond just dispute filing. They market the ability to work directly with credit bureaus and creditors on individual cases of inaccurate reporting. Their website emphasizes that they "set high expectations" for service quality and position themselves as dedicated credit experts in the economic/financial services industry.

Honest assessment: While the company provides legitimate credit repair services, the website makes specific success rate claims (90% on judgments, 95% on late payments) that are unverified and should be viewed skeptically. The $149 analysis fee is non-refundable per their structure, and results timelines (30-90 days) are optimistic estimates. Like all credit repair companies, their actual impact depends on whether items being disputed are genuinely inaccurate versus simply negative but accurate, which they cannot remove. No information is provided about FCRA compliance, legal certifications, or regulatory oversight.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: No long-term contracts required; $99/month with stated ability to cancel anytime
Transparent pricing structure: $149 analysis fee upfront, then clearly stated $99/month service fee
Specific claimed success rates provided for different dispute types (judgments 90%, collections 80%, late payments 95%, inquiries 88%)
Free initial consultation before any financial commitment
Promises ongoing weekly education and guidance throughout the credit restoration process
Personalized strategy development based on individual credit situation rather than one-size-fits-all approach
Works on disputes across multiple categories: judgments, collections, late payments, and inquiries
cons: Success rate claims (90%, 95%, etc.) are unverified and not independently audited; typical industry success rates are much lower
The $149 credit analysis fee is nonrefundable even if customer decides not to proceed with the $99/month service
No information provided about company credentials, FCRA compliance, legal certifications, or regulatory licensing
Cannot guarantee results and cannot remove accurate negative information, only dispute inaccuracies—this critical limitation is buried in fine print
No timeline guarantees; '30-90 days' is stated as range when 'most customers' see results, suggesting highly variable outcomes
best_for: Consumers with verifiable errors or inaccurate accounts on their credit reports who want ongoing guidance
People with judgments, collections, or late payments who believe specific tradelines contain errors
Individuals seeking a month-to-month commitment option rather than prepaid or contract-based services
Those who want educational support alongside dispute filing to understand credit mechanics
diagnosis: Careys Credit Repair is appropriate for consumers with documented inaccuracies on their credit reports who want hands-off dispute management with month-to-month flexibility. The critical caveat: they can only remove inaccurate information, not legitimately negative accounts, and their unverified success rate claims should be heavily discounted when making enrollment decisions.
services: Credit report analysis and diagnostic reports identifying negative factors
Disputing inaccurate items on credit reports with credit bureaus
Direct creditor and credit bureau negotiation on individual cases
Ongoing monthly dispute work and follow-up
Weekly educational information during credit restoration process
Guidance on debt settlement and debt collector interactions
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 2300 Valley View Ln Suite 907, Irving, TX 75062
